name: v05-multi-tenant-router
description: Routes incoming requests to the right tenant-specific sub-workflow based on the X-Tenant-Id header. Each tenant has its own workflow registered separately (v05-tenant-acme, v05-tenant-beta, v05-tenant-gamma) — real deployments would give each its own auth, business rules, rate limits to keep them properly isolated. This top-level workflow is just the dispatch layer. Demonstrates: switch + sub-workflow combination with per-tenant routing, default arm rejecting unknown tenants with a structured 400.

body.hint: Set X-Tenant-Id header to one of: acme, beta, gamma

inputs.expression: ((dispatchKey) => { const childResp = ctx.state[dispatchKey]; const childData = childResp && childResp.data ? childResp.data : childResp; return { routed: true, dispatchedTo: dispatchKey, child: childData }; })(['dispatch-acme','dispatch-beta','dispatch-gamma'].find(k => ctx.state[k] !== undefined))
